titleStmt.title: Letter from John Condon to the Under-Secretary, 23 June 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: John Condon

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: A letter from John Condon to Sir Robert Chalmers (1858-1938), Under-Secretary for Ireland, indicating his willingness to accept the post of Clerk of Crown and Peace for County Westmeath at a reduced salary and that he has already advised Ignatius John O’Brien (1857-1930), the Lord Chancellor, of this fact. Accompanying this letter is a note dated 21 June 1916, from the Home Office to Condon acknowledging his letter of 17 June 1916.

msIdentifier.collection: Chief Secretary's Office Registered Papers; CSO RP/1916/5615/10712/1

correspAction.persName: Sir Robert Chalmers, Under Secretary for Ireland.

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
Offices, Newcastle, Co. Limerick,
and Listowel, Co Kerry.
Newcastlewest Office. 23rdday of June 1916 Dear Sir I am willing to accept a
reduced salary owing to war
Conditions for Clerkship Crown & Peace
for Westmeath if appointed and
I have so informed The Lord Chancellor
already. Yours faithfully John Condon The Under Secretary
Dublin Castle
21st June 1916 Dear Sir I am desired by the Home
Secretary to acknowledge the receipt of
your letter of the 17 June. Yours faithfully , John Condon Esq. I Has been ackd
II Add to file of
candidates for Clk of Cr.
& Peace, Co Westmeath
26.6.16
